Package com.ju57a7ouc4n.phishlab.engine

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static AnalysisEngine getInstance()

    • setProgressListener

      public void setProgressListener(AnalysisProgressListener listener)

    • processUrl

      public AnalysisResult processUrl(String rawUrl)
      Executes the complete analysis pipeline for a given URL. Pure data processing, completely decoupled from the GUI.
      Parameters:
      rawUrl - The raw string input provided by the user.
      Returns:
      An AnalysisResult object containing the threat score and evidence.

    • addErrorListener

      public void addErrorListener(ErrorListener listener)

    • notifyError

      public void notifyError(String title, String message, Exception e)

    • anErrorOcurred

      public void anErrorOcurred(UserHandledError error)
      Specified by:
      anErrorOcurred in interface ErrorListener

    • addDomainToList

      public void addDomainToList(String domain, RuleType type, String reason)
      Adds a specific domain to the local database (Whitelist or Blacklist). Acts as a bridge between the Controller and the Data Access layer.
      Parameters:
      domain - The exact domain string to be registered.
      type - The RuleType enum (WHITELIST or BLACKLIST).
      reason - The justification provided by the user.

    • setApiKey

      public void setApiKey(String apiKey)

    • onProgressUpdate

      public void onProgressUpdate(String message)
      Specified by:
      onProgressUpdate in interface AnalysisProgressListener
